calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2001 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on behalf or by plaintiff. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to compl with the court's orders and rules. Case dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by:
Sonia Wong. (212)
